auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Folk API key sent with the Authorization: Bearer header. Create and manage it in your workspace API settings: https://app.folk.app/apps/contacts/network/settings/api-keys

actions.name: create_company
actions.description: Create one Folk company using the official companies payload fields.

anyOf.description: The funding amount as a number.
The funding amount as a string.

fundingRaised.description: The amount of funding raised by the company in USD.

anyOf.description: The ISO 8601 calendar date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
The company industry.
The foundation year as a string.
The foundation year as a number.

foundationYear.description: The company foundation year in YYYY format.

anyOf.description: The company employee range.

items.description: A Folk group reference identified by group ID.

groups.description: The groups to associate with the company.

addresses.description: The addresses associated with the company.

emails.description: The email addresses associated with the company.

phones.description: The phone numbers associated with the company.

urls.description: The URLs associated with the company.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values grouped by Folk group ID and custom field name.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a Folk company.

anyOf.description: The amount of funding raised by the company in USD as a string.
The ISO 8601 calendar date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
The industry returned by Folk when available.
The company foundation year returned by Folk.
The employee range returned by Folk.

groups.description: The groups associated with the company.

addresses.description: The addresses associated with the company.

emails.description: The email addresses associated with the company.

phones.description: The phone numbers associated with the company.

urls.description: The URLs associated with the company.

anyOf.description: The ISO 8601 date-time returned by Folk when available.

fullName.description: The full name of the workspace user.

email.description: The email address of the workspace user.

anyOf.description: A Folk workspace user.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values grouped by Folk group ID and custom field name.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when creating one Folk company.

actions.name: list_companies
actions.description: List Folk companies with official cursor pagination and the documented nested filter syntax.

limit.description: The number of items to return.

cursor.description: The opaque pagination cursor returned by a previous Folk response.

combinator.description: The logical operator used to combine multiple Folk filters.

filter.description: The official Folk filter object. Use nested properties such as {"fullName":{"like":"John"}} or {"groups":{"all":{"id":["grp_1","grp_2"]}}}. For empty and not_empty filters, pass true.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Folk companies.

anyOf.description: The amount of funding raised by the company in USD as a string.
The ISO 8601 calendar date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
The industry returned by Folk when available.
The company foundation year returned by Folk.
The employee range returned by Folk.

groups.description: The groups associated with the company.

addresses.description: The addresses associated with the company.

emails.description: The email addresses associated with the company.

phones.description: The phone numbers associated with the company.

urls.description: The URLs associated with the company.

anyOf.description: The ISO 8601 date-time returned by Folk when available.

fullName.description: The full name of the workspace user.

email.description: The email address of the workspace user.

anyOf.description: A Folk workspace user.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values grouped by Folk group ID and custom field name.

anyOf.description: The full URL of the next page when Folk returned one.
The cursor extracted from pagination.nextLink for the next list request.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata returned by Folk list endpoints.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Folk companies.

actions.name: list_group_custom_fields
actions.description: List Folk custom fields for one group and entity type.

entityType.description: The entity type such as person, company, or a custom object name.

limit.description: The number of items to return.

cursor.description: The opaque pagination cursor returned by a previous Folk response.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Folk custom fields for one group.

type.description: The custom field type returned by Folk.

color.description: The color string returned by Folk for the option.

items.description: One selectable option for a Folk group custom field.

anyOf.description: The selectable options returned for select-type custom fields.

format.description: The display format returned by Folk when available.

currency.description: The currency code returned by Folk when available.

anyOf.description: The configuration block returned for some Folk custom fields.

items.description: A custom field attached to one Folk group and entity type.

customFields.description: The custom fields returned by Folk.

anyOf.description: The full URL of the next page when Folk returned one.
The cursor extracted from pagination.nextLink for the next list request.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata returned by Folk list endpoints.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Folk group custom fields.
